title: equisetum praealtum f. pumilum
intro: Equisetum praealtum f. pumilum, also known as the dwarf scouring rush, is a plant species within the Equisetum praealtum genus, characterized by its short, branching stems and feathery leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, derived from the presence of ferulic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Equisetum praealtum f. pumilum include its ability to reduce urinary tract infections, alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, and help manage blood pressure. Equisetum praealtum f. pumilum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to support urinary system health and overall well-being.
